circle.style: stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 1.5px; fill: white; fill-opacity: 1; stroke-dasharray: 6;

stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px; fill: white;
